title: application.hired payload (v1)
description: Emitted when a recruiter/hiring-manager marks an application HIRED. Producer: candidate-service (apps/candidate-service/src/lib/decision-events.ts). Ids are plain strings (Application.id is a cuid, NOT a uuid) — do NOT constrain to uuid format. Matches the typed ApplicationHiredPayloadSchema.
x-consumers: notification-service (APPLICATION_HIRED direct push to each stakeholder; audit + webhook fan-out)
onboarding-service (open an onboarding case — fallback when there is no separate offer.accepted)

jobTitle.description: Resolved job title, or null (best-effort cross-service lookup).

decidedByUserId.description: User who approved the hire, or null.

stakeholderUserIds.description: Stakeholder user ids to notify (hiring manager, recruiter). May be empty when none resolved.
